welcome: Hi! I'm Dottie the crayon! I love art, but I can't see very well yet. Can you teach me what things look like?
menu_subtitle: Draw pictures to teach Dottie how to see!
menu_mission_complete: You collected everything! You're the best art teacher ever!
part_trophy: You earned the art star trophy!
q1_start: Let's start! Draw me some pictures so I can learn what things look like!
q1_instruction: I'll tell you what to draw. Use your finger to draw it!
draw_cat: Draw me a cat! Any kind of cat!
draw_sun: Draw a sun! Nice and bright!
thinking: Hmm, let me look at your drawing...
train_got_it: I see it! Now I know what that looks like!
q1_done: Wow! I learned six things! My brain is getting bigger!
q1_learned: You taught the AI by showing it examples! That's called training data!
correct: Great job! You're an amazing artist!
summary: Let's see what Dottie learned from your drawings!
summary_bias: Most of your drawings are about one thing. Dottie might not know the others!
summary_learned: AI needs lots of different examples to learn well!
q2_start: Now let's see if I can guess what you draw!
guess_right: I got it right! Your training helped me!
guess_wrong: Hmm, I'm not sure about that one. I need more practice!
guess_no_data: I've never seen one of those before!
q2_done: Thanks for testing me! I'm learning so much!
q2_learned: Testing AI is important. If it fails, give it more data!
q3_start: Free drawing time! Draw anything and I'll try to guess!
q3_saved: Beautiful! I saved your art to the gallery!
q3_done: What an amazing art show! You're a wonderful teacher!
q3_learned: Humans and AI work best as a team!
all_done: You taught me to see! You're the best artist and teacher ever!
share_prompt: Want to save your drawing to show someone?
